summary: No new PTR build (#16 newest). Tiers refreshed (WoWMeta 18 M+ reclustering). WCL rdps-broken: 5 unreach/3 raw. 12 takes from 8 vids, queue 8->4. Wowhead 5/6 (M+ tank cache).

sources.detail: All 6 pages (raid+M+, all roles) re-fetched live via curl; parsed the <table class=tier-list> tier rows -> img alt spec names. Era-verified Midnight Season 1 / 12.0.7 (Devourer present). 80 assignments (40 raid + 40 M+), 0 unmatched, 0 tier moves vs committed. Snapshots 07-23.

Both pages re-fetched live; parsed tier__tier X-tier blocks (tier__title letter + first-tierlist data-original-title entries). Era-verified (Devourer present). Raid 39 (Vengeance DH still omitted upstream = absence, not error), M+ 40 = 79 rows, 0 unmatched, 0 moves vs committed. Snapshots 07-23.

5/6 pages via r.jina.ai (numbered 'N. Spec Class (X Tier)' list, tolerant of the '-Tier'/no-space forms): raid DPS/heal/tank + M+ DPS/heal = 74 rows, 0 unmatched, 0 moves vs committed. M+ Tank UNREACHABLE this run — r.jina.ai persistently served a cached amazon-adsystem ad-probe / chrome-only shell for that one URL across ~10 attempts (no-cache, browser engine, slash/query cache-busting all failed); direct Wowhead is Cloudflare-403 from the runner. Its 6 M+ tank tiers kept at committed values via upsert (page snapshot left at 07-22, ~1 day stale, within maxAgeDays 4). 5 refreshed pages snapshotted 07-23.

All 6 raid(throughput)/M+(score) pages re-parsed from __NEXT_DATA__ specTierListSection (icon 'Class-Spec' -> roster); 80 rows, 0 unmatched, 1 M+ tier move vs committed (Holy Paladin B->C = normal Archon daily churn; it went C->B on 07-22, back to C now). Snapshots 07-23.

Full re-fetch of all 9 raid bosses (throughput) + 8 M+ dungeons (score) across all 3 roles (51 pages); every encounter parsed 40/40 specs from __NEXT_DATA__. 680 cells, 55 changed vs committed (normal daily churn), 0 unmatched. encounter-tiers.json asOf 07-23.

Survivability tierList re-parsed from all 3 raid pages: 27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank = 40 rows, 14 tier moves vs committed (broad Archon survivability recompute — many A->S / B->A; single-source metric shown as-is, not consensus, verified against the pages). Merged via apply-metrics survivability key. asOf 07-23.

3 M+ pages re-fetched via r.jina.ai; parsed the detail table ('| # | TIER | ... | Spec Class Meta Build |'). Era-verified 'MN 12.0.7 / Season 1' - NO season flip. 40/40 specs (S/A/B/C/D), 0 unmatched. 18 M+ tier moves vs committed = WoWMeta Ckmeans reclustering during the reset week (its tier column tracks representation n/lb_ci); verified against the page, NOT a Blizzard retune (consensus movement averages out across the 5 sources). Raid pages still unranked upstream (null). Snapshots 07-23.

Per wcl-fetch/evidence.json (verdict rdps-broken, attemptedAt 2026-07-23T12:12Z): characterRankings(metric: rdps) returns a bare Internal server error on encounter 3176 - the redistributed-credit metric family is still broken upstream. Agent holds no WCL creds and did not fetch warcraftlogs.com. Zone 46 Mythic medians unchanged at the 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence rdps-broken); no zone 47 M+ cut can honestly land. Data unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence rdps-broken); zone 54 (all 3 role cuts) cannot land. 12.1 PTR raid-testing normalized scores unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence rdps-broken); zone 56 (DPS/tank/healer) cannot land. 12.1 PTR M+ testing rDPS/HPS metrics unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence rdps-broken); zone 52 Dummy Dome aggregate=amount median rDPS cannot land. spec.ptrDummy unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.

The deterministic src/fetch-wcl.mjs step (frozen recipe) paginated each DPS dummy metric:dps leaderboard and merged 103 per-spec raw-DPS medians before the agent started (evidence.landed wcl-dummy-raw = 103 rows; players 1T:2000 2T:192 3T:140 5T:1986). Agent did not re-fetch or edit these rows; asOf 2026-07-23.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-54 Heroic best-parse raw-DPS across 8 bosses (6 populated: Nek'zali 370, Sentinels 363, Vashnik 678, Lost Explorers 150, Sszorak 184, Twin Fangs 146; Coiled Altar & Ula'tek 0 = untested windows) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-23.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-56 S2 PTR key raw-DPS across all 8 dungeons (players 994-2000 each) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-23.

40/40 rows (27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank) re-fetched live via plain GET; parsed each meta-item card by display name -> rating-before- (Devourer & Outlaw use shortened /spec/m+ promo hrefs, caught by display-name match). Era-verified Midnight Season 1. Range 3738-4288. asOf 07-23.

26/26 non-Augmentation DPS fight profiles re-fetched via talent_target_scaling/castingpatchwerk; MID1 confirmed on every chart; targets 1/2/3/5/8/15 taken as best-build per count. Augmentation absent by design. asOf 07-23.

Nightly MID1_Raid report (.txt, 1.5MB) re-fetched; DPS Ranking block parsed, best hero-variant per DPS spec = 26/26. Build MID1 (12.0.7), no season flip. Tanks/healers/Augmentation excluded by design. asOf 07-23.

Period 1073 (newly built - prior run had 1072) re-fetched live via r.jina.ai at /period/latest (SvelteKit; homepage is a JS shell). Era 'Period 1073 MID1', no season flip. All 40 specs parsed from the flat per-spec representation list (fresh reset week, so values spread out vs 1072 - e.g. Guardian 17.8->13.8, Unholy 17->12.0). asOf 07-23.

Forum thread (Discourse .json) + Wowhead news RSS both checked live. NO new build: forum highest post is still #16 (Linxy, 2026-07-21, 'Week of July 21st'), already logged. RSS since then is only datamine recaps of #16 (Hunter/Shaman/Warrior tier-set changes) plus M+ dungeon + PvP tuning - none a new class build. No season flip (thread still '12.1 PTR Development Notes').

All 25 unique creator RSS feeds polled live (25/25 OK). Deterministic transcript step fetched all 8 queued build-#16 reaction videos (summary.json verdict ok). Distilled 12 in-scope takes from all 8: Whispyr (Assa +6%), Obli (Unholy San'layn Blood Beast +1400%), Baze (Fury+Arms Slayer stack buffs), Shadarek (Devourer Collapsing Star +12% still behind / Havoc +5% rebalance), VooDoo (Devourer Void's Guard sims), Kalamazi (Aff buffed / Demo nerfed), Dratnos (Arms Dreadnought AoE rework), Supatease (Resto Sham + Aff); superseded 17 older same-spec takes. Queued 4 new in-scope 07-22 videos (izen tuning#7, MadSkillzz Resto-Sham, Kesslive Evoker, Kalamazi Warlock-followup); izen latest refreshed. Pending queue 8->4.
